dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Mmmrrrrnnn....

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know, Charon, your associate Hermes apparently had a wager with you that I could beat you twice in a row at some point? I'd hate to disappoint him, so... no hard feelings?

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Nnnrrrraaaaaauugggghhh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Haaahhhhh....

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm, Charon, look, I can explain. It's just, I've grown very accustomed to taking stuff throughout my father's realm. I wasn't stealing from you, honestly!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Mmnnnrraaauuugggghhh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: That was not an understanding sound. Wait, why are you brandishing your oar in such a menacing way?

endLines.speaker: CharProtag
endLines.text: Oh. It's because you're going to kill me.

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Haaahhhhh....

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You're just testing me, here, right, Charon? I mean, when you place a huge sum of coin conspicuously within my reach, what do you expect me to do?

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Nrrnnhhh, hnnnn, hrrnn, hrrrrrnnn...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Sounds good, mate, when I rob you from now on it's just my way of saying Charon, I would like to battle you to the death right now for a quick change of pace.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Got you, mate! Twice in a row. I guess Hermes wins his little wager with you, then. You tell him I said hrrrrrnnnggghh!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Hrrrrrnnnggghh...

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Hrrrnnnggghh....

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Grrnrnhh, rrraahhh!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Hrraaaahhhhhh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Hrrn... grrraaauuuggghh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Rrnn... hhrraaaauuuggghh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Grrr... nrrraauuuggghhh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Urrh... urraaauuuggghh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Krrr... krraauuuggghh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Hhh, hrreehhhhh!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Charon
dialogueLines.text: Haahh, nrraugh, haaaaah!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Eugh, still can't believe Megaera got mixed up with you, redblood. For all her weakness, I always thought at least she took her job here seriously. Eh, live and learn!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Not interested in your nasty remarks about her, Alecto. Though if you keep them up, I'm warning you, I might get mad.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, you might get mad? Defend Megaera's honor, since she's far too weak to do it her damn self? You think she's so pure! Hahaha! You're disgusting! Both of you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Tisiphone's started to say the strangest things, lately, redblood. You wouldn't happen to know anything about that, would you?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, don't fret. I was just trying to help her expand her somewhat limited vocabulary.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Stay out of her head!! You really think she's got something to learn from you? Learn to shut up from her!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Hey, redblood. I have done a lot of thinking, and I've come to the conclusion that I want you never to speak to me again. Ever. Got that?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: ...Erm, I don't know how to respond to what you said without directly disobeying your request, Alecto. But for future reference, fine, I'll bite.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You'll die! There's no use standing here flapping our gums when we could cut to killing one another right away. Come on!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_Unnamed_02
dialogueLines.text: Ah, hah hah, hohohohohhh. Finally. I've been waiting for this! Really.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You must be one of Megaera's lovely sisters, I don't believe we've had the pleasure. Waiting for what, exactly?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: ...So sick of, you know, doing my regular job, uninterrupted. Not having to clean up Meg's messes!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I get the feeling we're starting off on the wrong foot.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Anyway. I always wanted to kill a god. You'll have to do.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Know something, redblood? Try as I might, I still have not forgiven you for beating me last time. Call it a crippling character flaw, I don't know...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Forgiveness can take time. Though self-reflection is a healthy step. We're making progress!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You think we're making progress? Here? Ah, hah, ha-hah, ha-hah, ha-hah, why you piece of trash! I'll show you progress.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Redblood, I'm getting awful sick of seeing your smug face, time, after time, after time.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Have you given any thought to just... leaving me alone, and going back to wherever it is you came from?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You see? That is exactly what I mean. To think that Megaera had to put up with you for, I don't know how long.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Damn you for this, redblood. You're making me look bad, you know? Making me feel bad.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Alecto, I didn't ask you to repeatedly attempt to kill me. How did you expect me to respond?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ah-hahah-hahaha, hahah, you do know what happens when you make me feel bad, don't you...?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Huh, it's the god of trash, come once again to filthy up this place! You're getting real predictable, you know.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Considering I beat you last we met, I'd be much more concerned with your predictability than mine.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Don't want to hear it from you, trash! Just want to see you bleed. Now you come here!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, look at you, redblood. You're practically already dead! Now that's no fun at all.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Sorry to disappoint you, Alecto. I know you enjoy being responsible for a hundred percent of my bloodshed.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh, that's all right, no hard feelings at all! You just be sure to get in better health before next I get to kill you, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You know I smelled your blood from three chambers away? Hope you saved some of it for me.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I've saved some of my blood, yes! Though I was thinking I'd hang onto it for now, if you don't mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Do I look like someone who doesn't mind, trash god? I'll take your blood, however much you've got.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: What's the matter, redblood? You look a little paler than usual. Been bleeding much, having to get this far?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I ran into some setbacks, if you have to know. But don't worry, I'm sure I've plenty left to bleed.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh whew, that's a relief all right! I was so worried that I wasn't going to be the one to kill you this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You're looking pretty beat already, there, redblood. So let's finish you off.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Next time, don't you go losing so much blood before you get here, trash! I like to take it out of you myself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You're no god! You're nothing but a piece of trash. Born into all of this. And you don't even want it!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You seem to have me all figured out. And here I thought we were still getting to know each other.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Tsch. Well. You want to know what I want? Here, I'll show you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You know what I like about you? The way you bleed. Mmm.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: That... is not the type of flattery I'm used to. You're making me a bit uncomfortable, I'll have you know.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Never met a god that bleeds like you. Red. Like a worthless mortal. Come on! Let's bleed you dry.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Let's get to work, redblood, what do you say? Me, I say you've kept this girl waiting long enough.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, I say I don't appreciate you calling me redblood. You're making me rather self-conscious about it, you know.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hoho, you're funny. But you'll break. They always do.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I have got to admit, you are really frustrating, you know, redblood? What is it going to take to make you scream, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What, you mean to say Meg never told you? And here I thought you two were close.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ehh, we'll find out. I've got plenty of ideas left I've been meaning to try.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You know something, redblood? In retrospect, I should have known this wasn't going to be a quick job.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: They say both gods and mortals are notoriously poor at estimating how long it takes to get anything done.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Normally when I'm on the job, they grovel, then they scream. They shut up eventually, but not you. At least, not yet.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Huh! You really must like pain an awful lot, redblood. Or maybe it's just me.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You see, Alecto? Turns out we do have a common interest after all.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Did you just--? Don't you ever compare yourself to me again, you trash. You want more pain, I'm happy to oblige.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I've got a lot to be thankful for, you know, redblood? Your daddy could have shut you in the lowest pits, and then we never would have met!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Perish the thought, Alecto. What would you have done with yourself if not for all our fated encounters?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I don't know! I mean, before we met, I flayed all sorts of other trash down here! But lately I've been keeping them waiting, because of you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Good job, redblood! You made it all this way! But, I have got to send you back to daddy, now. Nothing personal!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Wish you could join me, Alecto. Want me to put in a good word with Father next time, so you can come visit us at the House yourself?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you know, I'd rather have my eyes put out, but thanks for offering! Now, time to head on home.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You know, redblood, my appointments usually don't come to me, much less again and again! Think I'm here to show you a good time, huh?!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Alecto, I just like to see you menacingly smile. And, hey, having to deal with you now and again beats having to fight Meg all the time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Whaa?! You think dealing with me beats dealing with that weakling? Graaaah!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: How many times is it going to take, redblood? How many?! Tell me! How can you stand running into me like this, over and over?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, habits can be hard to break. As for how many times, I've really no idea. Though I guess there's one way to find out.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'll give you one thing... I like it when my prey bites back. Come on, let's see some blood again.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'm going to enjoy this, redblood.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Just when I was beginning to feel bored.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'm going to tear you limb from limb, redblood.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: The Fates must want to spill your blood as much as I do.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Time to die, again, redblood. Let's get to killing you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: This job never gets old, redblood, I can assure you that.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Well if it isn't the god of trash himself. Come die.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Good, I was getting real tired waiting around to kill you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Aww, you came back all this way! I'm flattered, redblood.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Got some kind of deathwish, don't you. Fine.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh, thank the Fates I get to deal with you this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Let's see what you can do, redblood. Come on!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Get ready for a bunch of pain and suffering, trash god.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Well! Look who's back. The god of trash, himself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa, hold it right there, redblood.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Been waiting here to beat you to a bloody pulp, redblood!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Don't even open that damn mouth of yours, redblood. Except to scream.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You must like pain, or something, don't you, there, redblood?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Somebody's dying soon, redblood! Ohh, I can't wait.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Come give me everything you've got, trash god!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Let's see what you're made of, trash god! Come on!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Looks like my prayers to the god of trash have finally been answered, huh?!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: What's the matter, there, redblood? Gone awful quiet! Did I hurt your feelings, huh?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, I'm going to bleed you till you're dry.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You want to mess with me again, redblood?! Well then, come on!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: How is it possible I am so sick of you, but never sick of killing you, redblood?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Step on it, redblood! I've got lots of other trash to whip, you know!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You want through that door back there, it's going to cost you blood!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Megaera's not just weak, she's got bad taste to match.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Good thing your daddy hates you, or I wouldn't have the pleasure here, redblood!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Live or die, your daddy doesn't care, redblood!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh good, I was just itching for a live one, here, trash god.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'm real sick of waiting here, so how about we make this real quick, redblood!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Nothing like nice, fresh blood to warm things up in here, I always say!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: When I heard you were coming through, redblood, I told my sisters I would see you here.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, we are going to enjoy this, here, redblood!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Heard you were in the area and volunteered for this, trash god.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Time to spill it for me once again, redblood.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'll send you screaming home to daddy, now come on!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'm getting real sick of you, trash god. Come on!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Bad news for you, redblood. I like dying.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Come on, redblood, let's see you kill me again!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You're stuck with me forever, trash. Remember that.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'm really starting to hate you. You know that, redblood?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Why if it isn't the god of trash himself. I'm so honored.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Good news for you, I'm in a real bad mood right now.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Been looking forward to this chance to get you back, redblood.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Heard you were in the area, and thought I'd take another stab at killing you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Redblood, I really don't appreciate what happened here last time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You might get through me, trash god, but I'm going to spill your blood before you do!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Long as I slow you down, redblood, I've done my job.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You got Tisiphone, so what. Now I'll get you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You mess with Tis, redblood, you mess with me, get it?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Tisiphone's been having problems with you, huh. Let's see if I can help.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Nobody messes with Tisiphone but me, redblood.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You think just 'cause you got through Megaera, you'll get through me?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Your daddy never should have given Megaera this job.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Megaera couldn't make it, redblood, so it's me and you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Hah! It's Megaera's hot mess. Let's clean you up.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'll just keep killing you, redblood. Not that I mind!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: What are we going to do with you this time, now, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'm impressed, redblood. You really never learn.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Turns out, killing the god of trash never gets old.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: How would you like to die this time, redblood? Here, let me guess.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You just don't get it, do you? Though I bet I can make you learn.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Whew, I thought I'd never get some quiet time again, you know, redblood? That damned Pact you stupidly agreed to, making me work with my sisters again. I'll get you for that!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I'm sensing a pattern that it really doesn't take much for you to have something to get me for, does it?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh, that's rich! How smart of you, you're smart! Know what? I'll get you for that, too.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You must have gone and signed a Pact! Isn't that right, redblood? Tell me right now.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, as a matter of fact, I have. Though I don't see how that's any business of yours, Alecto.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I like working alone! And you don't see me doing that, right now, do you? So I would say it's my business, all right. Along with killing you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Heard rumblings about some news back at your daddy's House, redblood. So his illustrious abducted Queen, she's come back home?!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Wait, how do you even know all that? And should you really be talking about the Queen that way?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I don't answer to her! She can come and go as she wants for all I care. But you want to know who can't?! Yeah, you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I got to ask, how come you keep on showing up, redblood? I thought you would have had enough beatings by now.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, you know, I've come to enjoy these visits with you so much, Alecto, that I've made it something of a regular routine. Form good habits, and then stick to them, I say!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You call this a good habit, huh? Maybe for me, it is. Well, come here all you like, and I will be here waiting, every single time! About once every three times, anyway.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Heard you had a real bash down in your daddy's House, redblood. So sorry I couldn't make it. Next time, though, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Next time, definitely, Alecto. We missed you for sure and wish you could have made it!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Hohoho, I'm sure you did. But, you know, work comes first! So let's get busy.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You ready, Megaera? Tisiphone? Let's go.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You ready, Sis? This redblood's nothing to the both of us.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Check it out, Sis! The god of trash is here. Let's get to work.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Well, Sis, what do you say we get started on him?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: There he is, Sis! I'm ready if you're ready.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: All right, Sister! Let's rip him all to shreds!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You ready for him, Sister? I most definitely am!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You're never getting through the both of us without losing a lot of blood, trash god.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: My sis and I, we're going to tear you limb from limb, redblood!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Think you can scoot right past the both of us, trash god?!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: All right, Sis! You just back me up against this trash!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Check it out, Sis! The god of trash is here. Let's get to work.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ugh, would you just look at him! That smug look, that posture, everything! Please tell me you're not going soft for this trash-god, Sister.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Come on, Alecto. When was the last time that we looked to one another for approval? Besides, as long as we kill him, what do you even care?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You know, fair point, there, Sister! Very nicely said. Let's kill him, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Look at this awful piece of trash, come here again to bleed all over our nice shiny floor. Ready to fight my lovely sister, there, redblood?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: He's not so awful once you get to know him, Sis. Not that it matters for what we're about to do.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: The both of you disgust me, Meg, you know that? Get it together and kill him this time, damn you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, there he is, sisters. It's time to get to work.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: You ready, Megaera? Tisiphone? Let's go.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Let's tear him into shreds, sisters, come on!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Hey, check it out, sisters, he's back. You ready?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: He's come crawling back again, sisters. Let's get him, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: All right, sisters! Don't screw this up for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: I'm taking point against this trash, sisters. You back me up.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: All three of us against this trash, sisters? All right!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hohohohoho, look at him, sisters! Don't you just want to whip him all to shreds?!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Much as I love chatting with you, Meg, Tisiphone... our prey is here.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Oh hey, redblood! You're back for more. I like that stubborn stupidness about you, honestly. If only I could keep you alive even longer this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What, you planning to kill me with insults this time?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Haven't decided how just yet. This girl likes a little spontaneity.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Huh! Normally my marks don't make a habit of seeking me out again after I'm through with them.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I can imagine that, it's just, I've really come to appreciate these little back-and-forth exchanges that we have.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy2
dialogueLines.text: Ugh, I do so hate to let you down like this, redblood. But you're just not my type. Maybe I'll finally get it through your head this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmmurrr... derr...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm... how about, no? No murder. No murder!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmmuurderrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murder...? Murder, murrrder...!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I was really hoping we could change the subject. Please?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Muurderer... muuurrderer!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmm... mmm.... mmmrrrr....!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Let me guess. Murder? Murderer, perhaps? One of those two.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmm, mmmurder... mmmurder!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmrrrrr... mmurrr, derrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Please, I'm not a murderer, you don't have to do this.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murderer. Muurrdererrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murdererrr... murder, murder, murder!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: We're not getting through to one another, are we. I'm sorry that it has to be this way.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murderer. Murdererrr!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murder? Murder...? Murder....

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I don't understand. But I'm not who you think I am. My father sent you to stop me, that's all.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murderer... murderer! Murderer!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mrrr... murr.. derr... murrdderr!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No, murder. Zagreus. My name is Zagreus! Can you say that, Tisiphone? No murder. Zagreus!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murr... derr... zerrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mm, murrr... derr... zerrr!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You really did say murderzer, didn't you! That's progress! Zagreus! I'm Zagreus, I'm not a murderer! Can you say Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Derr... zerr... zahh... zahh, graaahh!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zerr... znnhh... zrrrnggh...!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Do you remember me, Tisiphone? My name is Zagreus. Prince of the Underworld? Pretty close with Megaera, I guess. Try saying Zagreus again for me?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zrrnngh... zaahh... zahh... gree... mrrsss...?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzaaahhh... durrr... err... Zzahh... durr.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you're so close, Tisiphone! Remember, Zagreus? That's me. I'm not your enemy, you know, don't you know that? I'm only Zagreus!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: ...Zzzzzaaahhh... gree... usss.... Zzaagreeusss! Zaagreuss!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzaaggreussss.... mm... murrdererr....

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No. Wait. Just the first part. No murderer. Just Zagreus. Or... let's see, how about... happy? Can you say happy?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmrrr... Zzzrrderrrerrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murdderr... Zzaagreusss... murddererrr...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm, well... let's try again with happy, how about that? Happy? No murder, only happy. Come on, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murderr... murderr Zzagreusss!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmmurddererrr... znnnhh... zrrrnnggh...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Eugh, I guess the happy thing just isn't doing it for you. Though, maybe trying to kill me like this is as close as you can get. You learned my name at least, that's something, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murrddderr... Zzaagreusss...

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmuurdderrr... murrdderrrerrrrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: ...Then we're back to square one. Look, I was just trying to get through to you with all the Zagreus and happy stuff. But, if you can understand any of this, Tisiphone, I think you're all right, just the way you are. Friends?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: ...Zzrrngh... zrrnnggh... zzrrdderrrerrr!...

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzz, zzaa... Zaaggreus? Mmurderrrer?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hey, uhh, any second thoughts, by any chance, about the whole happy thing? Just making sure.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zagreuss murderrrer!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_Unnamed_03
dialogueLines.text: Mmmm... mmmurderer...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you must be one of Meg's sisters! Nice to finally meet you. My name's Zagreus. Not Murderer. Definitely not.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murderer... mmmmurderrrerrrrrrrr...!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm... look, I've done some things that maybe aren't great, but I am very, very sure I haven't murdered anyone.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmmmurderrrerrrrrrrr...!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmmm, mmm, mmrrrrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mm, mmurrdererrrrr.... Murdererr!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murder...? Murrdderrr. Murddder!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Muurdddderrrerrr.... murdderrerrrr...!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmm, murdder? Murdderrer?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murder. Murder. Murder. Murder. Murder!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murderer. Murderer...! Murderer!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmuurrderrerrr...!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmurrrderrerrr...?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmm-hhhm-hmm-mmurrdderrr...

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmuuurrrrrderrrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murrdderrr? Murrdderrrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmm... mmmrrrr... mrrrrr!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mm, mmm, mmrrrnnggghh!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murderrrr!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzaah, zzz, zrnnghh... muurddderr...!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zz, zzzaggreuss.... Zagreus!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzagreus? Mmmurdderr Zaggreuss!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmurrdderrr.... Zzaaggreusss...!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzz, zzaa... Zaaggreus? Mmurderrrer?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzhhrr, zzzrnn, Zzzrrderrerr...

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zagreuss. Zagreuss...! Zagreuss!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzaaagggreussss....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzaaagggreussss...?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzaaagggreussss...?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzaaaggreusssss....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzagreuss? Zzaaggreusss. Murderrerrrrr....

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... zzuh, zzzrnnn! Murdderrrr!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zz, zrrngh, zzrraugghhh!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zagreussss!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzzaaaaggreusss....!

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Zzzagreuss, mmurderrr!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I'm here on official business this time, Tisiphone, so, uh... stand aside! Although, I guess the whole point of this job is that you're meant to try and stop me anyway, isn't that right?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmm, hrr-hrr-hrrdderrr...

endLines.speaker: CharProtag
endLines.text: Well then, let's get to work!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, sorry that you couldn't make the feast back at the House, Tisiphone. Though, I don't really think it was your kind of scene. Although, Ares was there, he's probably done some murders, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Murrddderrrr? Murrdderrr. Murddder!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_02
dialogueLines.text: You mess with Tis, redblood, you mess with me, get it?

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmuurrderrerrr...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Heads up, Tisiphone. I think I found a murderer for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy3
dialogueLines.text: Mmmuurrderrerrr...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You beat Alecto, Zag. Could hear her screaming her head off about it all the way through Tartarus... I almost want to thank you.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I almost want to say you're very welcome. Have you and she always been on bad terms like this?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: We have long-standing differences. It's worse with family. You know what it's like.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Things can't entirely be different between you and me. You know that, don't you, Zag? Not when it comes to this, at least.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I do. We wouldn't both be consummate professionals if it were any other way. You won't be going easy on me, will you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm going to pretend you didn't ask me that. Now give me everything you've got!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What is it, Zagreus? You've got that pleased-with-yourself look, which can only mean you have something obnoxious to tell me.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I never! Look, I'm simply pleased to see you, Meg. Hence the insuppressible smile. Could have been one of your lovely sisters here instead...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're not going to throw me off my guard that easily. My sisters wouldn't let me hear the end of it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Nyx really let Dusa go?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: She did... so you heard. I don't know what happened. You didn't even get a chance to say goodbye?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No. Damn it. If you had anything to do with this...! Even if you didn't, come on and die!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What is it that you're up to now, Zagreus? The Queen is back. But still you're making me show up like this?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Got some unfinished business with the Olympians to take care of, was in the area, figured I'd say hi. Hi, Meg!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't start with me. You show up here, we fight, somebody dies. That's it. Now, who's it going to be?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I heard that you escaped. Then, what are you still doing here? Forget something along the way?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know... I think I'd rather fight you to the death again than try to answer either of those questions, right now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I don't know what you're up to, Zagreus. But I guess it doesn't matter, either way. All that matters is you're not getting past me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: And where, exactly, do you think you're going, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I think I'm going all the way to the top again, Meg. To find my mother. You won't stop me. Get out of my way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: We both know that's not going to happen. Getting out of your way, I mean.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Your mother, Zagreus. You really think you'll find her once again, out there? Even if you make it out... maybe she's found another hiding place.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It isn't us she's hiding from up there. Father let her go. He never wanted to go after her. So I appreciate your concern, but I'll find her again.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: That sounds like information neither one of them would want for me to know. You know the punishment for spilling secrets, don't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: If there's anyone in all the Underworld who owes you, Zagreus, it's your friend, Sisyphus. He would be much worse off if not for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What, because I've been distracting you from administering lashings like before? I hate to think you prefer to whip with no fear of reprisal whatsoever, Meg.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Dereliction of duty and fear of reprisal are not one and the same. Though you don't seem to be concerned with either one.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Huh. Not even Tisiphone could stop you. Your father must be sorely disappointed.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: He's difficult to please, that much is true. What happened to Tisiphone, anyway? She isn't much for conversation.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: It runs in the family. Tis only knows her work. And, professional distance is important.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What happened to your weapon, Zagreus? I sensed its power long before you turned up. That isn't just some Daedalus enchantment on it.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, Stygius and I have been getting much more closely acquainted lately, Meg. Would you care to see the fruits of our healthy symbiotic relationship?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You, in a healthy relationship? Why yes, then this I have to see.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Hold it, Zagreus. I sense something, is that... ah. You've been in contact with Chaos. So even they are now involved with this.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Just because Chaos is giving me the power to crush you doesn't mean they're getting involved with this, does it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You don't know who or what you're dealing with. Ask Nyx about them for me sometime. Here, I'll give you a chance to ask her very soon.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: That Mirror's made you stronger, Zagreus. You're fortunate to have Nyx helping you.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No hard feelings. I think she feels partly responsible for all of this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: She shouldn't. The only one responsible for all of this is you. And I thought even you would have understood that by now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Ever stubborn, aren't you. Maybe my whip might make you reconsider whatever it is that you're attempting here.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Your whip's not been all that persuasive in the past.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Maybe persistence will pay off for both of us. Come, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: And there you are again. Lord Hades ought to lock you up rather than let you run amok in his domain like this.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I'm sure he'd welcome all this feedback from you, Meg. Or maybe you're just pining for my father's job?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I have no envy for your father's position. Besides, I happen to enjoy my own responsibilities.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, there you are. Just as I was beginning to think it's been too long since last I killed you, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Admit it, Meg. You can't stop thinking about me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't flatter yourself. I think of you in pain. And now there's no more need for the imagination.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, Zag? Any last requests this time before I send you home?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Let's see, how about a swift and painful death, would that be possible?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Be cheeky all you like. You'll get exactly what you asked, and nothing more.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What's that you're holding, Zagreus? Please tell me that you didn't steal the most dangerous, unstable artifacts sealed shut within your father's vault.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm, it wasn't I who stole them, if that's any reassurance to you, Meg!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You are a hopeless fool. You cannot possibly know what you're doing with those things. You put them back exactly where you found them.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Nice gloves, there, Zagreus. Think you can take me up close with those things? Well within striking distance of my whip.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Not wearing them for fashion's sake, here, Meg. You won't mind if I give you my best shot with Malphon here, will you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd mind if you didn't. Want to get your hands dirty, fine. Let's see it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What... where did you get the Rail? Do you know what you have? Where are your customary weapons?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I left them at home. And, I sort of know what I have, inasmuch as it's largely responsible for getting me this far. Would you like to see a demonstration?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Yes, I would. I always have, as a matter of fact.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Listen to me, Zagreus. Your mother is long gone. You're never getting out of here, and even if you did, what hope could you possibly have in finding her up in the world out there?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I've hope enough. Not that it's any of your business anymore.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Your family is here. And so is your responsibility. You're running from yourself. Though, I can slow you down a bit I think.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Tell me something, Zag, because I'm curious. Do your Olympian relatives know the real reason you've been trying to escape?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I'll get around to that in due time. They're family. They'll understand no doubt.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're in over your head, you idiot. You'll fray what bonds are left between Lord Hades and those ingrates on Olympus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Halt, Zagreus. Not one step further.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Come on, Meg. Haven't we had more than enough of each other by now? Besides, don't you have someplace else to be?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Your father sent me. All in all, I'd rather be on your bad side than his. Now you can turn back like a good little man, or I can send you home the painful way. What'll it be?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: ...I'll have to go with the painful way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: A man after my own heart.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Prince Zagreus, you are trespassing beyond the limits of your authority. I am under orders to stop you.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Come on, Meg, why so formal all of a sudden? We've been through this countless times. Wait, is it because...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, come on, Zag. Will you just learn to play along, for once? Come on and fight me like you mean it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What is it, Zagreus? You look a little hesitant to go another round with me. Or is it my imagination?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, it's just... can we really keep the personal and the professional completely separate like this, Meg? It's with mixed emotions that I fight you to the death, only to be happy to see you back at the House.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Then learn to keep your emotions in check. You keep them bottled up a while, they'll be that much stronger when it's time to let them out.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Nice earring, Zagreus. Maybe I should have thought twice before giving you a thing like that.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Why, because the gift you generously gave me may end up being instrumental in your own demise? Sounds straight out of one of those tales the mortals like to go spreading around.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: They like it when best-laid plans fall completely to pieces, don't they? You better grow to like it, too.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Your little bat companion not too much to handle, is she, Zagreus? I trust you're taking excellent care of her. Not that she needs your help.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh she's been positively perfect, thank you, Meg. Especially in how she puts us into contact when I need a hand. I hope it's not too much hassle, helping out from time to time?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: If you were hoping to avoid a hassle, you've definitely come to the wrong place.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You know Battie's not going to work here, don't you? I'm definitely not going to help you out of this one.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Come on, Meg, you can do anything if you set your mind to it! Though, don't worry, Battie's just here for the show.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Then, let's make it a good one. Come on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Even if you manage to get past me, there's no getting out of Asphodel. You saw what it was like. You really want to go back there?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's not a matter of want. The way out is there in that direction, past the river of flame.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're more stubborn than your father. I never thought that such a thing was possible.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Finally, you're back. You won't get past me like you did last time. Though, I would like to see you try.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Look at yourself, Zagreus, you are a total mess. Halfway to death or worse. You're making this too easy.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hit a few snags on my way to meet you, Meg. So, if you wouldn't mind going easy on me this one?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Not on your life or death. But I will kill you quickly, how's that?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're wounded, Zagreus. How unbecoming of a god. Not to mention that I have the upper hand.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I figured I'd give you a head start this time, so I let the wretched shades bludgeon me repeatedly along the way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Fool. If you're half-dead already by the time you get to me, what hope can you possibly have for what lies ahead?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You look like you had trouble getting to me, Zagreus. Did you try asking for directions on the way?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You sound like Hypnos. He's getting to you, isn't he. Isn't he!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You shut your mouth right now, with that. Come die.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're not escaping death this time, here, Zagreus. You ready to go home?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No, not just yet, though thanks for asking, Meg. If you intend to force me, know that I am going to resist, with all my might.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Well I appreciate the warning. Now prepare to die.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I have to level with you, Zagreus. For all we've been through... never once have I wanted you to meet my sisters.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I can't imagine why not! We had a lovely time getting to know each other. We laughed, we cried! My only regret was that you couldn't be there, yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You don't know what you're saying. There's a reason that they're not permitted in the House. Though, come on. One of us is going back there, now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You've really done it, Zagreus. My sisters have returned. All three of us now share the same assignment.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Is it wrong of me that I am somewhat honored to have garnered the attention of the Erinyes?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh I would say it's very wrong of you, indeed.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I thought you might show up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're right on schedule.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No need for small talk, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Up for another fight I see?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What say we get things started.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You ready for me, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Come on and show me what you've got.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's go, then, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm ready for you, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Not one step further, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I can't just let you off without a fight.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: It's you again, is it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Come all this way again, just to see me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Get on your guard, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Halt, Zagreus. Not one step further.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're prompt sometimes, I have to give you that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I wish it didn't have to be this way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Why must we always have to fight.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: It's time we had one of our little fights.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I so was hoping you'd show up just now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Now that you're here, how about a little dance?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: How about we go once more for old time's sake?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You ready for me, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: And here I was just wondering when you'd show up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: And there he is at last, the Prince himself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'll never stand aside for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm back again, and I'll keep coming back.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You'll get past me over my dead body.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm never going to back down from you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I guess we know how this is going to go.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm pledged to stand against you, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I will keep coming back, the same as you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I will not stand aside for you, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't know if I can stop you anymore, but I can slow you down.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'll get you back for what you did last time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: One of these encounters, you'll let your guard down, and I'll kill you again for old time's sake.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Even if I can't stop you... I can get a few good hits in, I'm sure.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I've got a lot of payback to administer here, let me tell you, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Ungh, I've practically lost count how many times you beat me in a row here, Zag...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Come for another round with me, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's see if you can make it past me, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No hard feelings, Zagreus. And don't you dare hold back.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: One thing I like about you, Zag? You're always right on time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope you're ready for me this time, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't think I'm going to go easy on you, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You know it's strictly business here between us, don't you, Zag?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I expect you to give me the best you've got, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: If you so much as think of going easy on me, Zagreus, I'll kill you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No holding back against me, Zagreus. Certainly not here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You'll find I don't grow weary of these run-ins with you, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You know I can't just let you walk away without a fight.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You won't be getting out of here without a dance.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: There's nothing you can do to hurt me, Zag. Though I would like to see you try.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm starting to enjoy these little outings with you, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Come on, Zag. Come at me with everything you've got.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Do you want me, Zagreus? Then come and get me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'll give you one thing, Zag. You never keep me waiting very long.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're looking pretty good, there, Zag. Though let me see what I can do.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No pleasure without pain, right, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You've come to die to me again?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I killed you last time, I'll kill you again.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I guess you want to die again?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: It seems you haven't learned your lesson yet.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope you'll pose more of a threat this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You don't seem to learn. Then, come and die.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You aren't getting past me, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I sense something different about you, Zagreus. Your old weakness. Ah... the Mirror. I thought you said you weren't trying to compete with me?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I wasn't. But then you gave me a good idea to try. I'm not as weak as I once was. With or without the Mirror's help.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Is that so? Well then let's see if you're correct. Come on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Your weapon's looking rather dull, there, Zagreus. Great Daedalus decided not to grace you with his gifts this time around?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Now that you mention it, he hasn't, no. Though I'm prepared to say I don't need special augmentations to get past you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, we can put that to the test right now. Just remember, you need all the help you can get.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Tsch. I can't believe it. You signed the Pact of Punishment. Have you completely lost your mind? Or just trying to insult me?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well if you're going to be so rude about it, maybe a little of each? Though, what do you even care which pacts I sign or don't?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm not an idiot. I see what you're doing. You want to be punished? Then, come on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Tsch. You really volunteered into a Pact of Punishment? You can't back out of it, now. You're even more of a fool than I already thought.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Maybe I just like a challenge, ever thought of that? Besides, what do you even care which pacts I sign or don't?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're right. I don't care. You want to be punished? Then, come on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I have been longing for a fairer fight with you. Maybe that's why you signed the Pact? To pity me?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I have my reasons. Pitying you isn't one of them. Although I guess you don't believe me, do you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: If it's punishment you want, how am I to say no?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You know I can hit even harder than usual with the Pact of Punishment working against you. Maybe that's why you signed it? To pity me?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I have my reasons. Pitying you isn't one of them. Although I guess you don't believe me, do you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No, I don't think I do. Come on, then, and let's see where all your pity gets you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What have you done with the Pact, Zagreus? This isn't even Asphodel, and I can barely tolerate the heat. Do you really want to die this terribly?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Appreciate all the concern, but I just thought I'd live a little, Meg. You ought to try it for yourself, sometime!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You ought to try watching your mouth. You want a swift and painful death, you'll have one momentarily.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: This should be over pretty quickly, I think, Zag. Never took you for the Forced Overtime type. That's not a Pact condition for the faint of heart.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You wound me, Meg! You know I like to barge into situations thoughtlessly and recklessly, and sort everything out later. Forced Overtime's the perfect fit!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, well, when you put it that way. Look, don't go saying I didn't warn you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Your mother has returned to us, already, Zagreus. And still you're going to keep battling your way out, past me and everything up there? Why?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Father says there's no escape from here, and I like to repeatedly show him he's wrong. Besides, I think getting out there a bit from time to time does me some good.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Sounds like you've found yourself a steady line of work. Most jobs just need doing. If this one gives you some fulfillment, stick to it. Now, come on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Been seeing an awful lot of each other lately, haven't we. You had enough of me, yet, Zag?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Never enough, Meg. You ready for another go at it, too, I take it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Always. Although I do like to keep things fresh, so... surprise me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Eugh, I almost want to thank you, Zagreus. I thought you'd never change that blasted Pact, and leave me here, in peace.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What, you mean you aren't lonelier without Alecto's or Tisiphone's companionship? They seem so wonderful to have around.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: They're tolerable each to some extent. About as much as I can say for you. Now let's the two of us begin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, Zag? May I have this dance for old time's sake?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You ready for me this time, Zagreus? Come on and fight. No holding back.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I guess we know the drill by now, don't we. Not that I don't enjoy our little arguments, in my own way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What are you doing, Zagreus? The Underworld is sealed off. What you're attempting is impossible. You've seen what happens when you go too far.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: This place can't stay sealed shut forever, Meg. In the meantime, I thought I'd get some practice in, you know?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm not your practice partner, fool.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: It's been a while, Zagreus. You must have made it pretty far last time. Let's see. Outer reaches of Asphodel?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Outer reaches of Asphodel. And I have to say, Meg, you are positively a sight compared with that blasted Bone Hydra stewing away up there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: How very flattering, to have compared me to the remains of some mindless outsized lizard. Come, maybe I'll kill you just as easily as your new Hydra friend.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: How many times have we been going at it like this, Zagreus? You tired of me, yet?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: We're both immortals, Meg. We'll be seeing plenty of each other for a while yet. I've come to welcome these occasions.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Then, good. Lashing you across the face beats waiting for the opportunity to do so. Come.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I heard what happened. You crossed the River of Flame. You really did it.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: That Hydra was a total bastard, though. Bastards. But, you sound practically impressed with me, there, Meg! I feel so flattered!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You'll soon feel something else. I don't know how you did it. But it changes nothing.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: How utterly disgusting... I was just counting, Zagreus, and as it happens, I have lost to you fifty times, already! If not more. Can you believe this? Ugh, how I've fallen.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, don't take it so hard, Meg! Once you die several dozen times, you start to get accustomed to the emotional pain, as well as the physical! Up for some more of either?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Of course! Who do you think I am? Although I guess there's no use keeping score with you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You know how many times you've beaten me, here, Zagreus? Can you even guess?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm... feels like a lot, admittedly, I mean, we've been going at this for a while, now. Four hundred and twelve times...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Five hundred times, exactly. Though I figure, you haven't been keeping track of how many times I've killed you. Ugh, maybe that's my problem. Well, plenty of time to work it out after this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Are you ready, Sister? Let's take care of him.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Come, Sister, it's time to get to work.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: He's here, Sister. Let's go.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: It's him. Prepare yourself, Sister.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Alecto and I were just wondering when you'd arrive.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: See, Alecto? He is right on time, just as I said.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You see, Tisiphone? He's here, just as I said.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Heads up, Tisiphone. I think I found a murderer for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's go, Sister. Together, we can take him.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Well, Sister, we'll have to finish catching up some other time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: See, Alecto? He is right on time, just as I said.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_02
dialogueLines.text: Megaera, bleed him!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Heads up, Tisiphone. I think I found a murderer for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Harpy
dialogueLines.text: Mmuuurrrderrrr...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: My sisters and I. We've had a chance to talk, and we have come to an agreement, Zagreus. As you can see.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_02
dialogueLines.text: Megaera, Tis, you ready?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_03
dialogueLines.text: Mmurdererr!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Three against one. Doesn't seem all that sporting, now, does it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: We're each well past the need for any sport. We'll kill you, whatever it takes. Erinyes! Now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: What's the matter, Zagreus? You look a bit uncomfortable. Something you want to say to me? Or any one of us?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well, it's just... there's something that I wanted to discuss with you, at some point, Meg, but after more consideration, I am thinking maybe now is not the time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I understand entirely. Though you should know my sisters and I keep no secrets from each other, anymore. Isn't that right, Sisters?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: He's here, Alecto. Tis. Let's get him, now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Prepare yourselves, Sisters. And you, too, Zag.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Together this time, Sisters. Go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Alecto. Tisiphone. Our guest is here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: He's here. Let's get to work, Sisters.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, Sisters? We have a reputation to uphold.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You ready, Sisters? There he is. Now, on my mark.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, Sisters, let's show him what we've got.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Alecto, Tis, he's mine. Just back me up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No time for further talk, now, Sisters. Take him, now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: No quarter now or ever, Erinyes. Attack!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: May I help you with something, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Now that you mention it, you can, Meg. I was wondering what was Father carrying on with you about back home?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Eavesdropping again? If you must know, my job performance is under review. Though, I'm sure this job's about to go just fine.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I sincerely hope that you enjoy these meetings with me while you can. I know I will.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Now that's a rather ominous thing to say to someone, Meg. Care to explain in terms an idiot like me could understand?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hades is exploring other options. He has no confidence in my ability to stop you anymore. Though, maybe it isn't too late for me to change his mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I sense something of death upon you, Zagreus. What's that you have, something from Thanatos is it?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, this old thing? It's just a listless butterfly Than gave me, which happens to fill me with even more supernatural strength than usual. Don't pay it any mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Not even Thanatos can help you here. But if I ever start a bug collection, I'll know who to call.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I know that Thanatos assisted you in getting to this point. I don't appreciate his interference.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I'm sure you'll have a chance to tell him back at home.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: He has domain over the wretched shades, but his power has no sway with me. And neither does your own.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: I still cannot believe that Thanatos is helping you. I mistook him for someone with integrity.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You mistook him for someone who blindly follows orders without considering the implications.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: How dare you...! If you like death so much, then here, let me indulge you. Thanatos will welcome you with open arms.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Pff. And here you are again. You're slow to learn the way of things I see.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I may be slow to learn, but... least I'm rather patient!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: This talk about your patience is beginning to test mine. Enough! Come on and die.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Give up already, Zag. Or I'll keep killing you each time you come this far.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I have some bad news for you, Meg. Little by little, I'm getting stronger.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: That may be so. But you will never be my equal. Ever. You'd do well to remember that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: You're never getting past me, Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: While that's probably the case... maybe I will this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_FurySister_01
dialogueLines.text: Keep telling yourself that. Maybe it'll help take your mind off the pain that is to come.

dialogueLines.speaker: Hades
dialogueLines.text: Hrm. It grew distinctly colder just as you arrived. So Demeter has been in contact with you, then. That witch. Tell me how much she knows.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What? I don't... wait, this everlasting winter, it's her doing, isn't it? Why? Don't mortals die when it's cold? Sounds like a lot of extra work for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Hades
dialogueLines.text: Then you are ignorant. Keep it that way, with her. Lest you risk everything, you understand? The consequences would be far worse than a foul stretch of weather. But, enough talk, now.

dialogueLines.speaker: Hades
dialogueLines.text: Hrm. It grew distinctly colder just as you arrived. So Demeter has been in contact with you, then. That witch. Tell me how much she knows.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: She lost her daughter... who's my mother. But, Demeter still thinks I'm Nyx's son, and... what have you done, Father? This everlasting winter, it's her doing, isn't it? Freezing mortals to death. Why don't you stop this?

dialogueLines.speaker: Hades
dialogueLines.text: The two of you know nothing, then, it seems. Keep it that way, especially with her. Lest you risk everything, you understand? The consequences would be far worse than a foul stretch of weather. But, enough talk, now.

dialogueLines.speaker: Hades
dialogueLines.text: Be still. These waters... teeming with Poseidon's river denizens. That one there, before me... it's been taunting me, I think, for quite some time.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You offering to take me fishing, Father? Sounds more pleasant than having you slaughter me again, or the other way around.

dialogueLines.speaker: Hades
dialogueLines.text: You mistook my meaning. First, you shall have my spear. Then, that thing shall, if it has not yet come to its senses. Though, if you vanquish me, I'm certain your uncle shall not mind if you extract it, yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Hades
dialogueLines.text: You now know that, even if you are able to surpass me, you shall ultimately perish, soon enough. And yet you still persist! Utterly senseless.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
