dialogueLines.text: Less prattle, more battle, boyo, give me all you got!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Can't break these bones, pal, what you just try it!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You want another a piece of this, or what?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Enough with the small talk, boyo, hit me, go on!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Trying to bore me to death with all this chit-chat, pal?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: This look like a shoulder to cry on to you, boyo?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Let me have it already, boyo, no holding back!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Let's see what you can do in terms of hitting me, pal!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You could be hitting me right now, boyo!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Sure could go for somebody just whaling away on me right now.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: What's the matter, you gone soft or something, pal?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You going to hit me over here, or what?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Go on, boyo, give me your best shot, it's my job!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Sure could use a good smack in the jaw from you right about now!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You want to fight me, boyo, well hop to it, stat!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: What do I look like, pal, some kind of conversationalist?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Our relationship, boyo, requires no exchange of words!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Nice place you got here, boyo! Name's Skelly, how's it going, but enough with the small talk already, I'm here to do a job. So let me have it! Give me everything you got!!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I don't remember having you on payroll, mate. Who's your supervisor?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Oh-hoh, I'm not about to rat my sources, pal! Just try and beat it out of me!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: For you, mate! Thought you might get a kick out of this.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: For me, pal? Awful nice of you, just awful nice, but guess what, I got this for you! Tit for tat, you understand, a deal's a deal!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Whoa-hoh, you being serious here, pal? You brought that all this way, for little old me?! That's real nice of you!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You're not so bad yourself, mate. Thanks for always being here for me to savagely attack without a second thought.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Whoaaaa, now get a load of what you got there, boyo! Wait, really, that's for me? Or you just pulling my leg?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I'm really giving this to you, mate. Now go enjoy it, will you? Once I've finished pummeling you some more just for the sake of it.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Heeey now that's what I'm talking about, thanks, boyo! Won't forget you doing me a solid like this, cross my heart!!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No need to thank me, mate. But don't you dare forget it or I'll attack you repeatedly and without mercy.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Oh look here, pal, I can't just keep accepting these from you! Not when they're paying me already, I got standards to uphold, you know?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I will look the other way if you do, mate. Now, here! Or else!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Haaah, you're kidding, what? Sometimes, boyo, you make me feel alive again, you know that? Being honest with you here, I'm grateful, really.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: If not for you, my friend, I'd have no one to viciously attack with no fear of reprisal whatsoever.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Skelly, while I know your services have already been paid in full, your sources ought to know you've been doing an excellent job. So much so, I wanted to give you this.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Whaaa, is that a vintage bottle of Ambrosia, pal?! I never even thought I'd get to try a thing like that, I mean, what am I, here? Know what, I want you to have this. To symbolize our friendship, and in case you ever need a hand out there.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hope you enjoyed that vintage bottle of Ambrosia last time, Skelly, because I got you another. Here!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Aww, no way, boyo, you kidding me right now? Why are you even, I... look, I, I just stand around and let you beat me up, you don't have to do this. You don't even know who I am. Who I was.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You're my friend, mate. That's all that matters. Although... I don't suppose you're willing to divulge those types of details? Just out of curiosity.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know, Skelly, I still cannot entirely get over that whole permanently-kill-you stunt you pulled on me. You had me deeply worried for a while, all for just a laugh?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, that's right! Not exactly much to do here, case you hadn't noticed recently! Good thing I'm able to stay occupied with intellectual pursuits.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: That's what you call it, then? In any case, I did want to make sure: You sure that you're all right, having to stand around like this?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You kidding, pal? This is the life! Imagine getting paid to stand around! And being pals with you!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Let me give you a piece of advice, boyo. You run across a guy like me out there, you just give him a good stab right in the back without a second thought before he sends you crying back to Papa.

endLines.speaker: CharProtag
endLines.text: I'll keep that in mind, mate.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You getting pretty strong, I'll give you that, boyo. Strong enough to smack a guy like me right up against the wall and I'd go straight to pieces, boom! You just remember, when you're duking it out, the walls are your friend!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Smack guys against walls. Sound advice as ever, mate.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Hey pal watch where you throw those bloodstone things of yours, you drop them, you go pick them up, you understand? But if somebody gives you grief, you got my permission to chuck one right in his eye!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I'll just aim generally for the midsection since the eyes are a lot harder to hit in my experience.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You're pretty quick, you know, boyo! Just be sure to use that fancy dash of yours and keep 'em guessing! Don't let 'em catch you standing still!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dash like mad instead of standing still. That's not the worst advice, I guess.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Little tip, boyo? You find any coinage while you're out there, you be sure to pawn it off to that old Charon, boatman guy? Use it or lose it, pal, use it or lose it.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Thanks, mate, note to self: Always spend everything I earn instead of ever saving.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Once in a while, pal, you're going to see a real fancy bozo try to ruin your good time. You'll know him 'cause he's glowing like a light, but that's his special armor, see? You got to punch right through it, he's going to shrug you off until you do!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: For a good time, beware the fancy glowing bozos on my quest. Check.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You know something, boyo, I think you could do a real number on one of these columns holding up this place, and bring the whole thing down in just a few swipes, boom, boom, BOOM! I'd hate to be standing near one of them if you did!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Wreck my father's finely crafted architecture every chance I get. That I can do for sure.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Boyo, next time you make it to the big VIP area upstairs, you watch out for those weapon-wielding gents out there! The eyeball soul thing that pops out when you beat 'em? You got to squash those, too, or else they'll grab their gear and come right back!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Crush the souls of Elysium's Exalted shades to stop them from regenerating over and over. I'll definitely do that next time I'm there.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: If you're having a rough time out there, boyo, you just remember something: You're a god, all right?! Way tougher than you think. They give you trouble, you just turn on God Mode, and you let 'em have it for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You act as though this God Mode is some sort of lever I can simply switch at will if ever I wish to unlock my latent strength, there, mate.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Don't suppose I can talk you into fighting back this time?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Not a chance, boyo, I'm paid to take it not to dish it out! Now give it to me!!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you're getting pretty strong, there, pal! Though, I am being paid to tell you that! But not being paid to not tell you that last part...

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I have to ask you something, mate. What do you even need the pay for, anyway?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: That, pal, is nobody's business but my own! Besides, it's impolite discussing money all the time! Now back to beating me to powder!

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Well, pal? You have come a pretty long way, let me tell you. I think most of the smarts I've picked up, you know by now. And so... if I'm fresh out of tips for you... I guess there's only one thing left to do.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Stand there eternally to be whaled upon at my whim, using whichever weapon suits me at the time?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: So Mama's back in town from what I hear, boyo! It's awful nice knowing I trained you well.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Erm, you must mean the Queen, and evidently you're aware of our relationship. You keep that quiet, understand, Skelly?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, and thus the pupil trains the master, for a change! I hear you, pal. Your secret's safe with me.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: You must have had yourself a real bash, with all those fancy gods and stuff! Could hear all the festivity from all the way out here. How was it, pal?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It... went better than expected, all in all. I hope you didn't feel left out! It was a pretty limited guest list. Kind of a diplomatic mission, I would say. Not quite as good a time as it might have sounded from the outside.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, don't you even worry about me, there, pal! I much prefer the solitary life, and besides! When things are good for you, they're good for me. Glad everything worked out.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: So, uh, pal? My sources tell me that you made it pretty far. Which means... my usefulness is coming to an end.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Your usefulness, what, you just mean the standing around, letting me lay into you with whatever vicious attack sequence I fancy at the time?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Yeah! Once you achieve your goal... my contract's up. You won't need me anymore.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: But only if I leave for good, isn't that right? So if I stuck around... you'd stay here, too?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Probably, but... wait, you're really going to stay?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Got to say, you're really getting somewhere, boyo, I'm pretty impressed here! And they don't even pay me to do that, I'm just supposed to stand around!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Appreciate the vote of confidence, mate. Maybe you're right and someday I'll get out of here. Hey, if I never come back, you won't just be stuck here forever, will you?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Heh, hehehe, that's a good one! No! Probably not. Wasn't anything in the old contract about that... huh.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Hitting a wall out there, boyo? Hey I know the feeling. You just keep at it, though! You're getting tougher, getting smarter... between the two of those, I'm thinking you'll pull through soon enough here.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Hahaha, got you pretty good, again, didn't I, boyo?! I am asking you to get me out of here. Hahahaha! All that stuff about your blade, and your Aspect, I mean, you ate all of it right up! Woo, hoo-hoo!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It appears I've been the victim of an elaborate prank. Not sure that I appreciate it, Skelly. What if I were to never hit you again, how would you like that?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, whoa whoa whoa whoa, whoa! Now come on, boyo, it was just a joke, I figured things could lighten up a little here. Don't need to do anything rash!

endLines.speaker: CharProtag
endLines.text: Then no more tricks like that again.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Listen, boyo: I don't know exactly how to put this, so I'm just going to come right out. I need your help with something, and, I'll be honest, I don't think you're going to like it.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: If it doesn't involve hacking away at you with reckless abandon, Skelly, I don't want to hear it. But... oh. You're being serious.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: I am. And funny you should put it like that. Boyo, I am asking you to get me out of here. Permanently, if you catch my drift. This standing around stuff... just kind of wears on you, after a while, you know?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: ...I know. I can only imagine. Tell me what I can do.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: That blade of yours back there. It's got a special power. You got to spruce it all the way up. Your Aspect, not somebody's else's. Then let me have it with that thing... and I'm out of here.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Then you'd be dead, forever? You're asking me to kill you.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: I know it's a lot to dump on you, but I got my reasons. I don't exactly have a lot of options, here, so... give it some thought. Till then, we'll act like nothing's changed, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: Listen, boyo: I don't know exactly how to put this, so I'm just going to come right out. I need your help with something, and, I'll be honest, I don't think you're going to like it.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: If it doesn't involve hacking away at you with reckless abandon, Skelly, I don't want to hear it. But... oh. You're being serious.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: I am. And funny you should put it like that. Boyo, I am asking you to get me out of here. Permanently, if you catch my drift. This standing around stuff... just kind of wears on you, after a while, you know?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: ...I know. I can only imagine. Tell me what I can do.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: That blade of yours back there. It's got a special power. Your Aspect, now that it's maxed out. You got to let me have it with that thing... and then I'm out of here.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Then you'd be dead... forever? You're asking me to kill you.

dialogueLines.speaker: TrainingMelee
dialogueLines.text: I know it's a lot to dump on you, but I got my reasons. I don't exactly have a lot of options, here, so... give it some thought. Till then, we'll act like nothing's changed, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Tell me something, monster: Whence did you steal that kingly blade you're brandishing about? It seems ill-fitting for one such as you.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, this? I wouldn't say I stole it, so much as naturally wooed the Fates into bestowing it upon me. You could say I'm kind of testing it out.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, well then! I pity whosoever shall lay hands upon that cursed thing, once you are finished with this testing of yours. I think that we can make it rather quick!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ready yourself, Asterius, my friend! For our most hated enemy has come to challenge us again, before this loving crowd!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I don't understand this place at all. How is it you're still champion after all this time? After losing repeatedly and often, I mean.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What would you know of it?! There's more, much more, to being champion than empty victories! It is a way of thought. A bearing! A certain dignity which you shall never have!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Beware, Asterius! The daemon comes! The daemon, who would sever the fraternal bonds we share, if we so much as drop our guard!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What? You think I'm here to ruin your friendship? Look, to each his own in that regard, though since you bring it up, I really don't see why Asterius puts up with you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You see? Just as I said! Cover your bovine ears, Asterius, for this monstrosity would poison us to get the upper hand!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: He would pit you against me, Asterius. I can see it in his mis-matched eyes! I cannot shake the terrible vision that, someday or night, it shall be me, standing alone here, whilst you...? Whilst you take sides against me! With that fiend!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Asterius, about that, please consider it a standing offer, if you like. I'd rather have you as a friend than as a foe. Not sure that I can say the same for Theseus, of course.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You poisonous worm! I knew you had a more sinister trick at play, because your fighting style certainly is of no concern just on its own! Are there truly no depths to which you would not stoop?!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: ...I'm telling you, you're wrong, Asterius! He is no royalty, most certainly not any I would recognize! He's but a nameless, long-forgotten minor god born of the depths, and bound to stay in them!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: I, too, once was berated by such words, king. We've faced this enemy how many times? And in my estimation, he's fought bravely, here.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Bravely?! Hiding behind those pillars is what you call bravely, Asterius? We shall have to discuss this strange lapse of judgment after we achieve our victory!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: ...I'm telling you, you're wrong, Asterius! He is no royalty, most certainly not any I would recognize! He's but a nameless, long-forgotten minor god born of the depths, and bound to stay in them!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: I, too, once was berated by such words, king. We've faced this enemy how many times? And in my estimation, he's fought bravely, here.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Bravely?! Hiding behind those pillars is what you call bravely, Asterius? We shall have to discuss this strange lapse of judgment after we achieve our victory!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I hope you're perfectly pleased with yourself, hellspawn. Because Asterius has been quite cross with me! Such as he is. He says I have misjudged the likes of you! Outrageousness.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: You don't hear me, king. We still have a lot to learn about this foe. Each time, he's differently equipped. Weapons, god-given abilities, and such. Despite our efforts... it's been difficult to read his strategies.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: And now, you're saying I can't fight, Asterius? Even though I had no difficulty besting you within that maze of yours?! Come on, let's do this fight!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I hope you're perfectly pleased with yourself, hellspawn. Because Asterius has been quite cross with me! Such as he is. He says I have misjudged the likes of you! Outrageousness.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: You don't hear me, king. We still have a lot to learn about this foe. Each time, he's differently equipped. Weapons, god-given abilities, and such. Despite our efforts... it's been difficult to read his strategies.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: And now, you're saying I can't fight, Asterius? Even though I had no difficulty besting you within that maze of yours?! Come on, let's do this fight!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: You'll have to excuse the Champion, there, short one. He hasn't been himself. Though he'll still fight you to the death, I'm sure.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: That's good, because you had me worried for a moment, there. Hey maybe I can knock some sense back into him, what do you think?

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: I'm not so sure. I've tried. But I know better than to underestimate you. Fight us, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: You'll have to excuse the Champion, there, short one. He hasn't been himself. Though he'll still fight you to the death, I'm sure.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: That's good, because you had me worried for a moment, there. Hey maybe I can knock some sense back into him, what do you think?

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: I'm not so sure. I've tried. But I know better than to underestimate you. Fight us, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Well, worm! Come fight us, I suppose. And take fullest advantage of the havoc that you sowed! We are no team! We're merely two combatants, simultaneously booked to be here, now.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: King, I think you are over-reacting, here. Try to be reasonable. And be more considerate about my point of view. Don't think I am asking for too much.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You're asking the impossible of me! But, let us fight. And let us lose, I'm sure, because if we are not a team, what are we, then, Asterius...?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Well, worm! Come fight us, I suppose. And take fullest advantage of the havoc that you sowed! We are no team! We're merely two combatants, simultaneously booked to be here, now.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: King, I think you are over-reacting, here. Try to be reasonable. And be more considerate about my point of view. Don't think I am asking for too much.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You're asking the impossible of me! But, let us fight. And let us lose, I'm sure, because if we are not a team, what are we, then, Asterius...?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Please fight with me, again, Asterius. I mean, just like before! You must forgive me my indecencies of late. This blasted fiend! His lies and treachery get right under my skin. Or the phantasmagorical equivalent!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Swear something to me, king. That you'll discard your fears about our bond. The short one here is never going to break it. He doesn't even understand it. The only one who can break it is you, yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I... oh, my dear friend, Asterius. I see, of course, you're right, you're right. You're right! And I solemnly do swear to you, indeed, that I shall never again doubt our brotherhood! Nor shall I ever listen to this fiend! Together, now and always!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Please fight with me, again, Asterius. I mean, just like before! You must forgive me my indecencies of late. This blasted fiend... his lies and treachery get right under my skin. Or the phantasmagorical equivalent!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Swear something to me, king. That you'll discard your fears about our bond. The short one here is never going to break it. He doesn't even understand it. The only one who can break it is you, yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I... oh, my dear friend, Asterius. I see, of course, you're right, you're right. You're right! And I solemnly do swear to you, indeed, that I shall never again doubt our brotherhood! Nor shall I ever listen to this fiend! Together, now and always!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What are those bestial gloves of yours, blackguard? Beginning to show more of your true and savage nature, here perhaps?

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: No. He bears the Twin Fists in the aspect of a king called Gilgamesh. That king, he, too, wrestled a beastlike man, who then became a friend. Maybe that's why I knew this fight would come.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What are you telling me, Asterius? Now is certainly not a good time for waxing philosophical, I think! And, surely this King Gilgamesh of whom you speak is much more competent a fighter than this filth!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What are those bestial gloves of yours, blackguard? Beginning to show more of your true and savage nature, here perhaps?

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: No. He bears the Twin Fists in the aspect of a king called Gilgamesh. That king, he, too, wrestled a beastlike man, who then became a friend. Maybe that's why I knew this fight would come.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What are you telling me, Asterius? Now is certainly not a good time for waxing philosophical, I think! And, surely this King Gilgamesh of whom you speak is much more competent a fighter than this filth!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: The gods are testing us once more, Asterius! For, how else to explain this fiend approaching us, bearing such blessings as would normally be fit only for heroes such as we?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You do know I'm related to them, right? The god of the dead is my father? I'm sure word's gotten around. Not that I want deferential treatment from the likes of you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Good! For you'll get nothing of the sort. The gods are on my side, not yours, monster! What business would they have, abetting you?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You know, hellspawn, I have been thinking on this for some time, and I've a declaration I must make: I shall hear no more of your silver-tongued lies. You come here, and we fight, and that is all!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What are you even talking about? I barely get a word in edgewise, much less Asterius over there. You know what? Fine. I've had it with you, anyway.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: And I've had it with you! Now, come, Asterius, let's shut this blackguard up! Or shut him down, whichever you prefer.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: There is but one thing I shall give to you, blackguard. Other than the razor-sharp point of my blessed spear! You are resilient. Time after time, you challenge us! Sometimes I fear I shall develop some sort of grudging respect for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I've no such fear, myself, Theseus. Though, I appreciate you noticing. You're quite an inspiration, you know? I wouldn't come all this way to destroy just anyone.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: To be destroyed, you mean! I see you plain, monster. You seek the glory of this fight, before this crowd? You yearn for it! Then, you shall have it! Just as often as you please!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I vividly recall our every clash against you, daemon. Each victory! And even the defeats. But you? You've not learned anything, have you?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's all right, Theseus. We have a splendid painting of you back at the House, for those moments when I invariably forget you exist. You were quite dashing with long hair, you know!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: So, I am honored even in the lowest pits of hell? And yet, remembered in my carefree youth. Not in the wisdom of my latter days! Well then, remember this!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Now hold a moment, fiend! Asterius made me aware that you recently asked of him an autograph. A tribute to his fame! As I am Champion, I am prepared to generously offer mine, as well.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh! No thanks. Appreciate the offer, though. How about a fight, instead?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ah, pffsch, you...! 'Twas merely a jest! I'd not have given you the cloth about my loins, much less my name! But a fight you certainly shall have!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: So, hellspawn! You seek to break through to the surface of the world. But you shall not achieve your goal, whilst I yet live and breathe! Or the equivalent of it, here in the splendors of Elysium!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Then you leave me with little choice but to make you shut up, already. And your bull-headed manservant there.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: That Minotaur whom you address is my dear friend, you preconceiving stain upon the earth! Asterius and I are brothers here in death as we were enemies in life. Not that you could ever understand fraternal bonds as strong as ours!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ah-hah, the fiend comes crawling back once more, drawn as he is much like the unassuming moth unto the flame of righteousness!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh no! Not the flame of righteousness! Are you finished? Let's get this started, I've come a long way.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Hear that, Asterius? Our fiendish visitor is begging us for mercy. Begging us, no doubt, to drop our guard!! Together now, my friend, let's vanquish him, and may the glory of Olympus guide us!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: And where do you think you're going, fiend?! Thought you might scoot right past Asterius and myself without a fight?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: No, on quite the contrary I've been under no impression that avoiding conflict is an option here. So say your piece, and let's get on with it.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You, hellspawn, shall not traverse that gate behind me whilst my compatriot and I equivalently live and breathe! Prepare for death!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ah, hahaha, you are just in time, Fiend from Lowest Depths! Asterius and I have trained extensively since our last skirmish here!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: So all you do here in Elysium is train for martial competition? You're constantly awaiting your next fight to the death?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: And who are you to judge, you misbegotten, shameful, unfilial maggot? It is an honor to have the opportunity to spend my afterlife perpetually standing in your ruinous path!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: See here, Asterius! The god-hated fiend is back once more to be destroyed by our joint, righteous fury!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: God-hated? You'll have to be more specific. I have the gods on my side. Though I suppose you do, too. Why can't they make up their minds?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: They have made up their minds! They stand united against darkness, as do I! With the exception of Asterius, here, who serves the light! Let's serve it now, my friend! To battle!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ah, hahaha, it's finally time, Asterius. He's here! Aren't you, now, you vile, insignificant hellspawn? Prepare now to be overrun!!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, this is unfair... that's a bronze-plated Macedonian Tau-Lambda! What's an obnoxious bellyacher like you doing with the most durable chariot created, to date?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Pah! You don't deserve to know. Suffice it that Asterius and I were handsomely rewarded once again. And we shall not hesitate to exploit our hard-fought spoils against you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Come forth, blackguard, and you shall soon be crushed under the massive wheels of the finest chariot the world has ever known!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You only have that chariot because of me, you know. It's all because of a condition of the Pact of Punishment! Nothing you did or earned. So drop the act!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Hahahahah, what?! You claim to be my benefactor, when in truth, you are my figuratively mortal enemy?! I'll do the chariot-equivalent of trample you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Come, blackguard! And be crushed beneath the raging wheelwork of the Macedonian Tau-Lambda, once again!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Theseus, you do know you look even more ridiculous than normal wearing that mask? I get the chariot and the unsporting weaponry, but why wear that thing?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Bah! This blessed mask was crafted by great Daedalus, himself! A work of art, and my entitled claim as champion! What has he ever done for you?!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Well, you senseless monster, I suspect you're not so pleased with yourself, now! Behold!! For my glorious chariot has been restored!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, indeed, nice work! Though must have cost a fortune in gemstones and diamonds, restoring an old Macedonian. I thought it was totaled after last time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: The only thing which shall be totaled here, you heartless property-destroying scourge, is you yourself! Asterius!! Together, let us break him!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: My chariot and I stand ready for you, daemon! And I assume Asterius, as well! I feel it in my phantom heart, we shall not fall to you this time!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know, my opinion of the Macedonian Tau-Lambda has fallen precipitously of late. Though perhaps it's not the chariot but the driver.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Silence!! Show me a finer chariot-driver anywhere within Elysium, why, you cannot! I'll run you down for such an insult to my pride!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ready yourself and your fine armor, friend Asterius! I shall drive circles around him, whilst you dispatch him with your mighty axe!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Your strategy might work a little better if you didn't shout it loud enough for me to hear. Though I have to say I'm impressed you can drive, fight, and shout all at the same time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: And I, fiend, am impressed that you yet live and breathe! A temporary state Asterius and I shall soon alleviate! To war!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: I warned you, short one. Now you face a foe more terrible even than I. The only other foe whom I have ever faced, who bested me.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Hold, fiend! You'll walk not one more step toward the light of day, so long as I am here.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Theseus?! No way! You two are legends! I'd be honored if we had a sporting contest here!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, a naked attempt to sway me from my convictions. Defend yourself, you blackguard! And may the gods show you some mercy, for I shall not!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Beware, short one. Now you face a foe more terrible even than I. The only foe whom I have ever faced, who bested me.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Hold, fiend! You'll walk not one more step toward the light of day, so long as I am here.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Theseus?! No way! You two are legends! I'd be honored if we had a sporting contest here!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, a naked attempt to sway me from my convictions. Defend yourself, you blackguard! And may the gods show you some mercy, for I shall not!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Hold, fiend! You'll walk not one more step toward the light of day, so long as I am here.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Two against one. Seems hardly fair.... Ah, well! <Snort> Let's kill him and be done, king.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Theseus?! The Bull of Minos?! You two are legends! I'd be honored if we had a sporting contest here!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, a naked attempt to sway me from my convictions. Defend yourself, you blackguard! And may the gods show you some mercy, for I shall not!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What, ho, that is a handsome spear you doubtless claimed deceitfully from some more-worthy bearer than yourself!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Oh, this old thing? How nice of you to notice. It once belonged to the hero, Achilles. A little past your time, but maybe you've heard of him? Seeing as he's much more famous than you ever were.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: How dare you say such things to me! I was the greatest king of Athens in my day! The tales of my exploits with Asterius and many other challenges shall long outlive whatever comes of you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Well, hellspawn, you stained my honor last we battled here. But as you plainly see, I have returned! As has Asterius! And we've no shortage of honor left to spare!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Shouldn't I  be the Champion of Elysium, now that I've beaten you? Isn't there someone else around to challenge me, say, Heracles? Someone less chatty?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ah, hahaha, very clever, fiend. Invoking Heracles' name, in an attempt to drive me to a jealous rage. It shall not work! But you shall dearly pay nevertheless!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I have recovered, as you can plainly see, monster! As has Asterius! And this time we are filled with renewed vigor, to destroy you utterly!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: So we're locked in an endless cycle of violence, basically. I guess that's one way for you to pass the time here in this stodgy place.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You take that back about Elysium! Or, better: I shall make you eat those careless, inappropriate remarks! Come, Asterius, to war!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: The monster has returned, in a vainglorious attempt to wrest the title Champion from me!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I couldn't care less about your title. Though, shouldn't you share it with the Minotaur? He's more than half the reason you've been any trouble.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You'll not drive a wedge between us, fiend. Asterius and I share a fraternal bond forged from the strongest bronze! Nay, adamant! But you have caused us both offense, so, die!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What's this, Asterius? This blackguard thinks that he can saunter in here whilst bleeding profusely, and confront the two of us?! A hollow fool!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Ran into trouble on the way with your combative friends here in Elysium. One more unfair advantage in your favor.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: How would you know of fairness, fiend? You belong in the lowest depths, forgotten in the mists of time! Come, let us send you there!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Look at this contemptible fiend, stumbling half-dead already into our hallowed colosseum! What transpired, monster, did perchance my Exalted brethren trouble your dark path?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Theseus? I would appreciate it if you could be more considerate of the substantial effort necessary just to reach this point where I can make you shut your mouth.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Effort, pah! You shall be imminently slain, and effortlessly, I am quite certain of that! Asterius, to arms!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What hope can you possibly have of vanquishing us, hellspawn, when you are visibly upon the verge of death? You are, more than usual, a miserable sight!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Thanks for your concern, there, Theseus. But I trust I have plenty of life left in me with which to destroy you, if not your companion as well.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Hah! What would you know of trust! Being a vile, grievously-wounded-already creature such as you are! Asterius, let's end his misery!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Prepare to be sent back into the depths whence you came!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, at last! Come, Asterius, let's vanquish this blackguard!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Come, hellspawn, and get destroyed by the two greatest fighters in Elysium!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Dare you clash against the Champion of Elysium and his most trusted friend?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: If you seek a swift and righteous death, you fiend, you've come to the right place!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Come forth and die, preferably with some amount of dignity!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: It's time, Asterius! Let us assert our greatness through single-minded combat!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: By the gods of Olympus, you'll go no further on your wicked quest!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: There is no greater pleasure in Elysium than vanquishing the likes of you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I swear upon my honor, fiend, you shall not pass!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: No matter how you try, you cannot shake the bond we share, monster!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You stop right there, blackguard, and make your plans for death!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: We've nothing left to say to one another, hellspawn! Other than: To battle!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Few others in Elysium are so unwise to take up arms against Asterius and myself!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You challenge us to battle, hellspawn?! Then, Asterius and I accept!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Attack us if you dare, blackguard! Asterius and I stand ready!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I see my brethren failed to thwart your advance. Well, you shall go no further!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Come forth, blackguard, and be vanquished by my righteous spear!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Asterius and I shall smite you back into the lowest depths of hell!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You are beneath the notice of the gods, monster! Whilst I have earned their favor!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You return at your peril, hellspawn. You'll get no quarter here!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Upon my faith, you'll take not one more step toward the light of day!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Face us, filth! However many times it takes, until you cannot stand it any longer!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: You face the Champion, and me. Ready yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: You face the Champion, and me. Ready yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Behold, Asterius! Our hated enemy has come to be dispatched before a loving crowd, once more!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Let us destroy him quickly, king. Or, perhaps slowly.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Let us destroy him quickly, king. Or, perhaps slowly.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Try as you might, monster, you shall not shake either my own resolve, or that of my dear friend!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Waste not more words with this one, king. Let's fight.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Waste not more words with this one, king. Let's fight.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Our foolhardy challenger approaches once again, I see! Well, then, prepare to be run through!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: It is as the king said. You will not leave Elysium except through us.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: It is as the king said. You will not leave Elysium except through us.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I shall never yield the title Champion of Elysium to the likes of you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You think that you can get through me again, hellspawn? Come try!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: I always shall rise up to thwart your wicked plans, monster!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Look who has managed to come crawling back, Asterius? Let us deliver him again!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Try as you might, monster, Asterius and I shall stop you!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: You must take sick, appalling pleasure in defeat, hellspawn!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: There, king! He has the weapons I told you about... the fists of Gilgamesh. Follow my lead this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: There, king! He has the weapons I told you about... the fists of Gilgamesh. Follow my lead this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Well now, Asterius, he's returned! And this time, we shall have to vanquish him without the aid of our divine armor! A worthy challenge, no?

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Be cautious not to underestimate him, king. He has proved troublesome before.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Nonsense, my friend! For how can one underestimate that which deserves no esteem whatsoever?! Together, now, attack!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Avert your eyes, fiend, lest the shining bronzework of the Macedonian should strike you blind! We are prepared to face your devilry!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Prepared for me, really? I've dismantled your ridiculous chariot before. Even Poseidon knows you're just a blowhard with a fancy ride.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: How dare you to invoke my Lord Poseidon's name?! And, to besmirch our complicated past! No god shall ever favor you as he has favored both Asterius and me!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Why, look, Asterius, the fiend returns! The rumors that he fled to haunt the surface must have been mere lies!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Well no, in this case, those rumors must have been quite accurate, it's just, I'm back! Realized I didn't want a future for myself that didn't include crushing you repeatedly like this.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hoho, such clever excuse-making from one so versed in treachery! Well, if you are indeed contained within this realm, then we shall be delighted to make sure it always stays that way! Now come and fight!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Have you yet heard, monster?! The Queen Persephone is back! To rule the Underworld in all her terrifying grace! Perhaps one of these days or nights she shall be present in the stands, to witness your destruction at our hands!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, about that? She's my mother. So maybe watch your fool mouth with me, or else I might just put in a bad word!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you disgust me, daemon, that you would even dare to say such things about the Queen! Prepare now to be vanquished in her name!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: So! The fiend returns to challenge us again, Asterius! Despite having experienced such a thorough thrashing by us last time!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know full well that wasn't a fair fight. Face me yourself and we'll see how you fare.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Silence, you monster! I'll hear no more such wicked lies, half-truths, or quarter-truths! You, however, soon shall hear my blessed spear! Specifically, the sound it makes whilst sliding into your exposed midsection! Defend yourself!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: So! The fiend returns to challenge us again, Asterius! Or, rather, to besmirch the honor of this competition!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Besmirch what honor? You're just complaining that you lost. Even though I was outnumbered!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Silence, you monster!! I'll hear no more such wicked lies, half-truths, or quarter-truths! You, however, soon shall hear my blessed spear! Specifically, the sound it makes whilst sliding into your exposed midsection! Defend yourself!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Upon my word, the fiend again darkens these halls! Alas, Asterius, it seems I was mistaken and he hasn't learned his lesson after all!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: And what's this lesson that I ought have learned? Is it to always slay you first since you're so damn insufferable all the time?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Your lesson, monster, is to never, ever take up arms against those favored by the gods themselves! You shall never see the light of day as I once did! Uh, no offense, Asterius.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: He's here, king. Activating armor. It's fortunate repairs on your chariot were completed in time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Nonsense, my friend! We could defeat this vile hellspawn with or without the additional divine protection we've been granted here! Get him!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: We're well-equipped to deal with you, short one. Though I know better than to disregard your might.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Speak for yourself, Asterius! I, for one, know only pure contempt for this foul daemon and his underhanded fighting style! A style we shall easily dismantle, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: We're well-equipped to deal with you, short one. Though I know better than to disregard your might.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Speak for yourself, Asterius! I, for one, know only pure contempt for this foul daemon and his underhanded fighting style! A style we shall easily dismantle, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What hope have you, monster, versus the blessed bonds of brotherhood?

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Best not belittle him, king. He is more powerful than he appears. We must remain alert, this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I am perfectly alert right now, Asterius! And were I still alive, I would be positively salivating at the thought of running through this pustule with my spear, or whichever means I had available! Now, let's go!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What hope have you, monster, versus the blessed bonds of brotherhood?

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: Best not belittle him, king. He is more powerful than he appears. We must remain alert, this time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I am perfectly alert right now, Asterius! And were I still alive, I would be positively salivating at the thought of running through this pustule with my spear, or whichever means I had available! Now, let's go!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Theseus, before you flap your ghostly gums at me again, I'd like to hear from good Asterius this time! He almost never gets a word in, thanks to you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: The king speaks for the both of us, short one. Though if you wish to hear me say something to you, I will oblige.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: And I, too, shall oblige! That is, oblige my trusty spear, which yearns to penetrate your soft and vulnerable, altogether pallid flesh! Now, die!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: What's this? Our enemy has come to mock us, Asterius! He holds the Yarn of Ariadne, and would flaunt it in our faces!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: What, this? I just picked it out of a Well. Was supposed to help me get here. No offense intended, more than usual. What's it to you?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: As if you wouldn't know! That Yarn is a token of days long gone. When Asterius and I battled in the Labyrinth, to the death! Together, we now face a greater threat. Attack us if you dare!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Again you mock me with the Yarn of Ariadne, blackguard. You ought know that woman's name means absolutely nothing to me, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You seem pretty put off by a random bit of twine, there, Former King of Athens. Care to share your innermost thoughts on the subject, or best keep them bottled up?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Nothing shall be bottled here, you filth! That she became enamored of me was not my responsibility, besides! She was naive! The same as you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: That blasted Yarn of Ariadne, once again!! Have you no shred of dignity at all, monster? Or would you stoop to any desperate means to draw me out?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Just happened to have it on me, Theseus. But it seems to keep upsetting you. Maybe you should seek this Ariadne in my father's realm, and make amends?

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Maybe you should shut up!! That Ariadne's dead to me. She has been since we were alive! I cherish her memory, yes. But only because, if not for her, I'd not have met Asterius! Now, meet his axe!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Why, look, Asterius! It seems the fiend has brought some sort of nondescript yarn-ball! Not seen the likes of it. Indeed, it holds no sway on me, at all!

dialogueLines.speaker: Minotaur
dialogueLines.text: King. The princess Ariadne was my sister, if you don't recall. Please do not denigrate her memory. <Snort> You're making me upset.

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Ah, no, my friend! I meant you no offense! But I'd no love for her, was that my fault?! Pff, forgive me. I... I shall seek her out. Someday or night. But first!! This daemon has to be destroyed. Together, no?!

dialogueLines.speaker: Theseus
dialogueLines.text: Why, look, Asterius! It seems the fiend has brought some sort of nondescript yarn-ball! Not seen the likes of it. Indeed, it holds no sway on me, at all!
